Advisory Board

Prof. Matthias Bethge

Professor, University of Tübingen; Founding Director, Tübingen AI Center; ELLIS Fellow

Prof. Roger Grosse

Associate Professor, University of Toronto; Schwartz Reisman Chair in Technology and Society; Founding Member, Vector Institute

Audrey Tang

Senior Accelerator Fellow, Oxford Institute for Ethics in AI

Want to Join Our Team?

We're always looking for talented individuals passionate about AI safety.

View Open Positions

EuroSafeAI is a nonprofit research organization registered under Swiss law, dedicated to advancing AI safety and security. We have a deep collaboration with the University of Toronto.
